remarks: Welcome to Washington Commons!!! Rare offering in one of the largest units in the complex, 3BD/2BR ground floor one level METICULOUSLY maintained condominium with a single family living feel. Enter into a foyer with a coat closet and a welcoming open floor plan setup that is sure to provide a nice balance between living and entertaining space. The primary bedroom suite has its own full bathroom. All kitchen appliances including the hot water heater have been upgraded. Central A/C, Smart fridge and in unit W/D set up among many wonderful features!!! The centrally located dining room feels like the heart of the home. It comes with an easy access to virtually every room and includes sliders to your very own outdoor covered patio. Durable Pergo flooring in all rooms but 3rd bedroom (currently utilized as storage to prepare for the seller's move). Assigned carport parking spot #6 plus any of the unassigned spots for extra parking. Walk to UCONN, Downtown Stamford's shops, restaurants, Stamford Mall, library and theaters, enjoy the walks to Mill River Park and walk to Metro North. Minutes to I-95 and Stamford Hospital for an easy commute. Don't wait!!! This one will not last...grab it while you can.
